subject: phone meeting re: financial trading in japan

emails.subject: Phone Meeting re: Financial Trading in Japan
emails.subject_base: Phone Meeting re: Financial Trading in Japan
emails.body: Phone Meeting re: Financial Trading in Japan Sara Shackleton and I would like to visit with you and Darren about the implementation issues going forward on ir/fx trading in Japan. Could you arrange a meeting with Darren and hook in with Sara and me at 6:30p.m.-7:00p.m. on Monday evening Houston time? If this time does not work, please suggest another time the early part of next week. Thanks. Alan

emails.subject: Re: Phone Meeting re: Financial Trading in Japan
emails.subject_base: Phone Meeting re: Financial Trading in Japan
emails.body: Alan- Both Darren and I are available for the conference call Monday at 6:30 p.m. (Houston time) to discuss financial trading in Japan. As Jane McBride will have already started as the permanent lawyer for Enron Japan, I will ask her to attend, as well. Cheers, John Darren Delage 09/13/2000 06:10 PM

emails.subject: Re: Phone Meeting re: Financial Trading in Japan
emails.subject_base: Phone Meeting re: Financial Trading in Japan
emails.body: Thanks. Sara and I will call your line. John Viverito@ENRON 09/13/2000 08:08 PM
